# OffMeta

> Natural language search engine for Magic: The Gathering cards. Type plain English ("cheap green ramp", "commander board wipes under $5") and get real Scryfall results — no syntax needed.

OffMeta translates natural language into valid Scryfall queries, runs them against the Scryfall API, and renders the matching cards. Scryfall is the source of truth for all card data; OffMeta is a search translator, not a card database.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Natural-language MTG card search.
- [Guides](/guides): 10 progressive guides for finding any Magic card.
- [Docs](/docs): Search reference, syntax cheat sheet, and FAQ.
- [Syntax cheat sheet](/docs/syntax): Scryfall search operators reference.
- [Combos](/combos): Find Commander combos by card or color identity.
- [Archetypes](/archetypes): MTG archetypes across formats with meta share and signature cards.
- [Market](/market): Daily MTG card price movers — gainers and losers.
- [Decks](/decks): Browse public decklists shared by the community.
- [Browse searches](/browse-searches): Curated natural-language search examples.
- [AI search index](/ai): Programmatic SEO landing pages for common MTG search intents.
- [About](/about): What OffMeta is and how it works.

## Optional

- [Card pages](/cards/): One page per Magic card with oracle text, prices, and alternatives. e.g. `/cards/lotus-petal`.
- [Guide pages](/guides/): One page per progressive guide. e.g. `/guides/search-by-creature-type`.
